page_content:
820 NFSC - Nutrition and Food Science

NFSC633 Food Polymer Science (3 Credits)

Food polymers including protein and carbohydrate from food, and

their chemical, physical, and functional properties together with

their structure-function relationship will be discussed. Food polymer applications in food and non-food areas will be covered. Principles and applications of instrumental methods for polymer characterization will be introduced. An emphasis on nanotechnology and its application to design and characterization food polymers will be included.
